metadata.purpose: Identify reliable data sources for Argentine public works / road construction contracts to fill the CompraR procurement gap in Neo4j graph
metadata.critical_gap: CompraR (COMPR.AR) only covers services/supplies, NOT public works construction. Companies like Techint, IECSA/SACDE, Electroingeniería, Cartellone have ZERO contracts in graph despite being major construction firms.
metadata.finding_summary: Found 5 high-value programmatic data sources with CSV/JSON/OCDS downloads covering ~9,000+ construction contracts with contractor names, CUITs, and amounts. The CONTRATAR platform is the single most important missing source.

data_sources.name: CONTRATAR — Procesos de Contratación de la Obra Pública
data_sources.description: Official electronic portal for public works contracting across all national agencies. This is the PUBLIC WORKS equivalent of CompraR. Managed by Oficina Nacional de Contrataciones under Jefatura de Gabinete.

resources.name: Procedimientos
resources.description: All contracting procedures — tender details, official budget, dates, procurement type

resources.name: Contratos (HIGHEST VALUE)
resources.description: Awarded contracts with contractor CUIT, company name, amounts

resources.name: Ofertas (Bids)
resources.description: All bids submitted — shows competitive landscape, who bid on what

resources.name: Obras (Work Sites)
resources.description: Work site details linked to procedures

coverage.agencies: All national public works — DNV (160 contracts), Min. Educación (52), Min. Obras Públicas (50), Min. Transporte (33), Parques Nacionales (19), Min. Interior (18), CNEA (16), Sec. Energía (15)

key_companies_found: SACDE S.A. (continuadora de IECSA S.A.) — CUIT 30-56845745-1 — 3+ contracts
BENITO ROGGIO E HIJOS S.A. (in UTEs) — CUIT 30716288214
LEMIRO PABLO PIETROBONI S.A. — CUIT 30-53300416-0 — 2+ contracts

data_quality.encoding_issues: Some character encoding problems (ñ → ½, é → ?)
data_quality.notes: Contract amounts sometimes empty but present in procedimientos. Relational structure allows joining across tables via procedimiento_numero.

data_sources.etl_recommendation: IMMEDIATE. Download all 7 CSV files. Join contratos + procedimientos on procedimiento_numero. Extract contratista_cuit, contratista_razon_social, contrato_monto. Create CONTRACT nodes linked to COMPANY and GOVERNMENT_AGENCY nodes. Handle UTE (joint ventures) by splitting into member companies.

data_sources.name: CONTRAT.AR Histórico — Pre-2021 Public Works
data_sources.description: Historical public works contracting data from before the current CONTRATAR platform. Single flat CSV with 858 rows spanning 2009-2020.

coverage.agencies: DNV (400), Min. Educación (165), Sec. Planificación Territorial (135), Sec. Infraestructura Hídrica (83), ENOHSA (41)

data_quality.notes: Flat file is easier to ingest than relational CONTRATAR. Has funcionario_contratante (signing official) which is valuable for revolving-door analysis.

data_sources.etl_recommendation: IMMEDIATE. Single CSV download. Parse contratista_razon_social + contratista_cuit_1. Note: contratista_cuit_2 may indicate UTE partners. Creates ~858 CONTRACT nodes.

data_sources.name: DNV Datos Abiertos — OCDS (Open Contracting Data Standard)
data_sources.priority: HIGH — rich structured data, overlaps with CONTRATAR but has more detail
data_sources.description: The DNV (Dirección Nacional de Vialidad) published an OCDS-compliant dataset covering road construction contracts. Includes parties, tenders, awards, contracts with full CUIT identifiers and monetary values.

coverage.status: NO LONGER UPDATED by publisher (as of 2024)

known_issues: Release tags not used correctly (most use only 'planning' tag)
Release dates incorrect (correspond to data consultation date, not event date)
data_quality.notes: Despite quality issues, the structured OCDS format with full party identifiers (CUIT) and monetary values makes this very valuable. The workDetails extension provides road-specific metadata.

data_sources.etl_recommendation: HIGH PRIORITY. Download JSONL.GZ (515KB). Parse each line as OCDS release. Extract parties with role=supplier, awards with value.amount, contracts with value. Deduplicate against CONTRATAR data using CUIT + procedimiento number. Provides richer metadata than CONTRATAR flat CSVs.

data_sources.name: MapaInversiones Argentina — Ministerio de Obras Públicas
data_sources.priority: HIGH — broadest coverage across all public works sectors
data_sources.description: Investment map consolidating all public works from Ministerio de Obras Públicas / Secretaría de Obras Públicas. Covers road, water, architecture, housing, health, education infrastructure. Joint initiative with Inter-American Development Bank (IDB).

coverage.update_frequency: Monthly (per metadata), but last updated September 2021 per datos.gob.ar
coverage.agencies: All Ministerio de Obras Públicas entities

strengths: Broadest coverage: 7,285 works across all sectors
BAPIN codes for linking to investment database
weaknesses: contraparte_cuit populated for only ~350 road works
No individual contract amounts — montototal is project total

data_sources.etl_recommendation: HIGH PRIORITY for breadth. Download CSV. Filter sectornombre='OBRAS VIALES'. Extract contraparte_val (company name) and contraparte_cuit where available. Use fuzzy matching to link company names to existing COMPANY nodes. The codigobapin field can link to BAPIN investment database. Creates ~1,465 ROAD_WORK nodes.

data_sources.name: Sistema de Contrataciones Electrónicas (COMPR.AR)
data_sources.priority: LOW for construction — already in graph, covers services/supplies NOT public works
data_sources.description: The existing procurement system already ingested. Covers goods and services but explicitly EXCLUDES public works construction (which goes through CONTRATAR instead). Listed here for completeness.
data_sources.resources_summary: 20 CSV files: Convocatorias + Adjudicaciones for 2015-2020, plus SIPRO provider registry and SIByS catalog

key_resource.name: Sistema de Información de Proveedores (SIPRO)
key_resource.description: USEFUL: Full provider registry with CUITs — can be cross-referenced against CONTRATAR contractors

data_quality.rating: HIGH for services, N/A for construction
data_quality.notes: This is the gap we are filling. CompraR does NOT include construction contracts.

data_sources.etl_recommendation: ALREADY INGESTED for services. But download SIPRO (proveedores.csv) to enrich company data with provider registry details.

data_sources.name: BA Obras — Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires
data_sources.priority: MEDIUM — city-level only but high quality
data_sources.description: Buenos Aires City public works platform. Contains construction companies, CUIT, dates, amounts, descriptions, locations. Over 1,100 works since 2016.

coverage.sectors: Public space (270), Schools (221), Architecture (132), Health (91), Hydraulic/Infrastructure (59), Housing (46), Transport (19)

data_quality.notes: Very clean data. Connected to Buenos Aires Compras procurement system. Limited to city works only.

data_sources.access_issues: Portal returned access denied during testing — may require browser-based access or different API endpoint
data_sources.etl_recommendation: MEDIUM priority. City-level data complements national sources. Try CKAN API: data.buenosaires.gob.ar/api/3/action/package_show?id=ba-obras. Good for Techint/Cartellone CABA projects.

data_sources.name: Presupuesto Abierto — National Budget API
data_sources.priority: MEDIUM — budget execution data, not individual contracts
data_sources.description: Argentina's open budget platform with API. Has physical and financial execution of public works by program. Does NOT have individual contractor data but provides budget allocation context.

api_endpoints.description: Physical Programming and Execution — public works progress

coverage.scope: All national government programs including public works

data_quality.rating: HIGH for budget data, LOW for contractor identification
data_quality.notes: Provides program-level budget execution (how much was spent on road construction) but NOT which company received the contract. Useful for cross-validation of total amounts.

data_sources.etl_recommendation: LOW PRIORITY for graph construction. Useful for validation: compare total CONTRATAR contract values against budget execution amounts. The PEF endpoint (physical execution) tracks obra pública progress at program level.

data_sources.name: BAPIN — Banco de Proyectos de Inversión Pública
data_sources.priority: LOW — restricted access, project-level not contract-level
data_sources.description: National public investment project registry. All public investment projects must be registered here. Contains project formulation and evaluation data across lifecycle.
data_sources.access_method: Authorized officers only. Registration via GDE through TOPIP. Contact: bapin@jefatura.gob.ar
data_sources.relevance: BAPIN codes (codigobapin) appear in MapaInversiones data — can be used to link projects across systems

data_quality.notes: Project-level data, not contract-level. Does not contain contractor names/CUITs. Useful for understanding project pipeline and investment priorities.

data_sources.etl_recommendation: SKIP for now. Use codigobapin from MapaInversiones as foreign key reference only.

data_sources.name: SUGOP / PPO — Sistema Único de Gestión de Obra Pública
data_sources.priority: LOW — internal management system, limited public data
data_sources.description: Internal public works management platform mandated by Secretaría de Obras Públicas. Covers planning, agreements, project management, work certificates, price redeterminations.
data_sources.access_restricted: Unclear — web interface loads but appears to require authentication

data_quality.notes: Internal system. Data likely feeds into MapaInversiones and CONTRATAR.

data_sources.etl_recommendation: SKIP. Data from this system appears in CONTRATAR and MapaInversiones downloads.

data_sources.name: AGN — Auditoría General de la Nación (Audit Reports)
data_sources.priority: LOW — PDFs not structured data, but useful for investigation leads
data_sources.description: National audit body reports on public works irregularities. Covers DNV, road construction, discretionary awarding. Reports from 2016-2023 available.

data_quality.rating: HIGH for investigative leads, LOW for structured data
data_quality.notes: Reports document irregularities — discretionary awarding, cost overruns, contract modifications. Not machine-readable but excellent for qualitative investigation.

data_sources.etl_recommendation: SKIP for automated ETL. Review manually for investigation context. Could feed into narrative research files.

data_sources.name: DNV Road Network Geospatial Data
data_sources.priority: LOW — geographic data, not contract data
data_sources.description: Geospatial data of national road network from DNV via Secretaría de Transporte. Available in SHP, GeoJSON, KML formats.
data_sources.etl_recommendation: SKIP for contract graph. Potentially useful later for geographic visualization of where contracts are concentrated.

data_sources.name: Buenos Aires Province — Infrastructure Tenders
data_sources.description: Province of Buenos Aires has its own public works tender system separate from national. Major construction projects for the most populous province.
data_sources.data_format: Web interface (not confirmed as open data CSV/API)

coverage.sectors: Infrastructure, urban, energy, water and sanitation, public services

data_quality.rating: UNKNOWN — could not confirm structured data availability
data_quality.notes: Provincial level requires separate investigation. May have CKAN or open data portal.

data_sources.etl_recommendation: DEFERRED. Investigate further whether PBA has structured open data downloads. Check datos.gba.gob.ar.

datos_gob_ar_api.notes: The datos.gob.ar CKAN API is the master index for all Argentine open government data. Use it to discover new datasets as they are published.

phase_1_immediate.description: Close the construction gap — download and ingest CONTRATAR + CONTRATAR Histórico
key_actions: Download all 7 CONTRATAR CSV files + 1 historical CSV
Handle UTE (joint ventures): split UTE name, create individual company nodes + UTE relationship
Normalize CUIT format (remove dashes for matching)
Join contratos + procedimientos on procedimiento_numero for full context
Create CONTRACT nodes with properties: amount, date, obra_nombre, organismo
Link to existing COMPANY nodes via CUIT matching
Create new COMPANY nodes for unmatched CUITs

phase_2_enrichment.description: Add breadth with MapaInversiones + DNV OCDS
key_actions: Download MapaInversiones CSV — filter OBRAS VIALES
Download DNV OCDS JSONL — parse parties/awards/contracts
Deduplicate: match CONTRATAR contracts against MapaInversiones via obra name + organismo
Enrich existing nodes with geographic data (province, department)
Add physical/financial progress data where available
Investigate BA Obras CSV download access
Research Buenos Aires Province open data portal
Investigate other major provinces: Córdoba, Santa Fe, Mendoza

companies_coverage_assessment.note: Assessment of whether the identified data sources will fill the gap for key construction firms

companies.name: IECSA / SACDE
companies.notes: SACDE is the continuadora (successor) of IECSA S.A. — Macri family construction firm

companies.name: Electroingeniería S.A.
companies.gap_filled: PARTIAL — only found in UTE, need more data
companies.notes: Major Kirchnerism-era contractor. May need Boletín Oficial or AGN reports for fuller picture.

companies.name: Techint / Techint Ingeniería y Construcción
companies.notes: NOT FOUND in any of the tested datasets. Techint may operate primarily through subsidiaries (Tenaris, Ternium) or international contracts. Also may appear under Techint Compañía Técnica Internacional S.A.C.I. Need separate investigation.
